title: [Sea Cave, Rocky Cavern]
description: Jagged stone teeth protrude from the floor beneath you, as though from the rotting jaw of a decaying giant.  As you make your way through the stalagmites, you notice one rough column of stone that extends over to a high ledge.

wayto.7669: ;e 3.times do;  waitrt?;  fput 'stand' unless standing?;  waitrt?;  climb_result = dothistimeout "climb stone", 3, /^(?:You start to climb the column of stone, but it proves so slippery that you slide back down and end up on the ground in a heap\.|You dance lightly up the column of stone and into the area beyond\.)$/;  break if climb_result =~ /^You dance/;end
